name: WorkspaceMigrationAttribute
summary: Specifies versions which workspace should be migrated between.

constructors.name: WorkspaceMigrationAttribute(string, string)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Migration.WorkspaceMigrationAttribute class with the versions which workspace should be migrated between.

params.name: from
params.doc: Version which workspace should be migrated from.

params.name: to
params.doc: Version which workspace should be migrated to. This parameter can be omitted that means workspace should migrate to the latest version

properties.name: From
properties.summary: Returns version which workspace should be migrated from.

properties.name: To
properties.summary: Returns version which workspace should be migrated to.
